name: cess Bank
description: cess Bank is focused on mainstreaming sustainable business practices into its operations. The Bank strives to deliver sustainable economic growth that is profitable, environmentally responsible and socially relevant, helping customers to access more and achieve their dreams.

# ACCESSbank
Stay alert to scams. ACCESSbank will never ask for your PIN, Social Security number, password, or account details by phone or text. Fraud alerts come from a short code, not a 10-digit number. If you receive a suspicious message, call us directly at 402.763.6000.
Close Alert
FDIC-Insured - Backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government

## Exceptional 1:1 service
A dedicated relationship officer, 24/7 support and much, much more!
[Executive Banking](https://www.accessbank.com/for-you/executive-banking)
![excellence, accessible, attitude](https://www.accessbank.com/assets/files/EZvftjIS/testimonial-bg.png)
## Why our clients love us
We pride ourselves on building strong, lasting relationships with our clients. Read below to hear some of their stories.
![ACCESSbank's customer, Nate Eskra from Regal Print, who provided a testimonial for the bank.](https://www.accessbank.com/assets/files/JKocQtyS/Nate.jpg)
_“I spent years with a national bank thinking that was all banking was supposed to be. It wasn't until I switched to ACCESSbank that I realized what banking should really be. The level of customer service and quality is unmatched. They know who I am and it shows how much they really care**."**_ Nate Eskra, Regal Print
![An ACCESS bank customer who has been satisfied with the bank's service for several years.](https://www.accessbank.com/assets/files/fBKr9RlT/Terri.jpg)
_“I've been a satisfied customer of ACCESSbank's for several years. The employees are always personable, helpful and friendly, no matter which branch you're at. Their customer service is amazing and I have referred several friends to ACCESSbank."_ Terri - ACCESSbank Customer
![Rodney White headshot](https://www.accessbank.com/assets/content/eungPN32/White_revised.jpg)![](https://www.accessbank.com/assets/files/ho4liHyz/Rodney.jpg)
_"After years of being frustrated at other banks, I finally found my banking home at ACCESSbank! Whether I'm working with a commercial banker, branch manager or the front line employees, the customer service is always first rate. Everyone greets me with a smile, and goes above and beyond to help. If a great customer experience is important to you, I can't recommend ACCESSbank enough."_ Dr. Rodney White, Sarpy Chiropractic
![Learn more about how we serve the greater Omaha community](https://www.accessbank.com/assets/files/j5xYjBTE/parallax-bg.jpg)
## We make things happen in Omaha.
At ACCESSbank we're here for a reason, to make our community stronger. Here's a glance at how we're doing just that. Want to see more examples of how we serve the Greater Omaha Community? Head over to our [Community ACCESS](https://www.accessbank.com/community-access) page!
### 353
* * *
The number of different non-profits we have given back to. We take pride in supporting as many non-profits as possible.
### $1.9 million
* * *
How much we have invested in local organizations since 2010. We understand the importance of helping community non-profits grow and succeed.
### 900+ hours
* * *
Volunteer time off dedicated by our employees to support local non-profits and strengthen the communities we serve.

ACCESSbank in Omaha, Nebraska is a financial institution that offers valuable personal and business banking products and services including [checking accounts](https://www.accessbank.com/for-you/accounts/checking), [savings accounts and CDs](https://www.accessbank.com/for-you/accounts/savings-and-cds), [personal loans](https://www.accessbank.com/for-you/loans/personal-loans), [mortgage loans](https://www.accessbank.com/for-you/mortgage), [business checking accounts](https://www.accessbank.com/for-business/business-accounts/business-checking), [business loans](https://www.accessbank.com/for-business/business-loans/business-loans), and more. Bank [online](https://www.accessbank.com/for-you/services-and-resources/online-and-mobile-banking), with our [mobile app](https://www.accessbank.com/get-started/download-mobile-app), or visit one of our six conveniently located Nebraska [branches](https://www.accessbank.com/connect-with-us/locations) in Omaha, and LaVista.
* * *

tavily.answer:
The official website for Citizens Bank is https://citizensstatebank.us. This site offers banking services and mortgage lending. For security, do not share personal details via email.
Citizens State Bank (CSB) is a community bank founded in 1925 in Somerville, Texas. It specializes in banking services with 51-200 employees. Chase is a major financial services company with over 10,000 employees.
Crunchbase is a predictive intelligence platform for private companies, founded in 2007, with over 80 million users. It provides data and insights for investors and analysts. Crunchbase is privately held and has 51-200 employees.
Wellfound is a New York-based recruiting platform that helps employers find and hire job seekers. It has raised $149.1M in funding. The CEO is Amit Matani.
DealRoom is an AI-powered M&A operating system for buyer-led transactions, offering secure data management and process automation. It integrates with various AI tools and provides resources for deal execution. It's used by leading corporate development teams.
